title: Touch Screen Enhancements
description: Improvements to the touch screen experience.
body:
Touch Screen Enhancements

Have you ever tried using the touch screen of a Steam Deck or another handheld PC and causing the camera to spin rapidly? Touch Screen Enhancements fixes this and also makes hotbar slots clickable for the best hybrid experience. Features: - Tap hotbar slots directly - Touch screen center to interact - Configurable! Any to all features can be disabled in the mod's config screen. ### FAQ: > Q: Does this mean I can play Minecraft with just the touch screen? > > A: No. You still need to use a controller (with a controller mod) or a keyboard.
